calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Judgement Pursuant To Stipulation For Judgment (Motions)
Off Calendar Dec-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT is GRANTED as follows: Plaintiff's request for entry of judgment is GRANTED as requested in the amount of $40,700. Plaintiff's request for attorney fees is granted in the amount of $3832.50 for reasonable and necessary number of hours at the rate requested.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion For Entry Of Judgement Pursuant To Stipulation For Judgment (Motions)
Off Calendar Nov-29-2023 Continued To Dec-29-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Adrian Sacharski, Esq. 415-433-1900 appearing via zoom for plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Plaintiff contested the tentative ruling, and request a continuance so he can provide supplemental pleading with admissible evidence to the court. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF 460 EDDY STREET PARTNERSHIP, A PARTNERSHIP MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT (MOTIONS) is continued to 12-29-23 at 9:30 am in Dept. 501 for moving party to submit declaration in support of admissible evidence of breach.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
